caption: A man with long dark hair tied back, wearing glasses, a white collared shirt, and a black embroidered vest with red and white accents, performs while singing into a microphone. He is positioned in front of a tan-colored slatted wall. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of audience members are visible. The man is playing an acoustic guitar, though only the upper body of the instrument is partially visible. A microphone on a black stand is positioned in front of his face. The text "ORCA" appears as a white logo in the lower right corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone, while his arm and hand move slightly to strum the guitar, and the heads of the audience members shift marginally.
